PROJETC MANAGER

project list panel
right info:
-edit
-export
-export/run (looks in the selected project root folder for any file ending with exe and if ther eis none, when you press the button it takes the game_app.exe parallel to the 
-rename
-remove (not delete)

Asset Exporter


Export
-looks in project root


Audio debugger
-four vertical bars:
-THIN music audio + volume control (mute button underneath)
-THIN dialogue audio + volume control 
-THIN sfx audio + volume control
-THICK master audio + volume control (sets all other ones)


res://
materials + textures/
  stone_texture.png
  stone_texture.texture.bin
  stone.material.bin
models/
configs/
  clous_configs.json

stone_texture.texture.bin*:
<rgba><rgba><rgab> (gou formatted texture, pure source)

stone.material.bin*:
{
  albedo_path: "stone_texture.png", (relative path?)
  normal_path: "",
  emissive_path: "",
  albedo_color: 00FF00
  specular: 0.5,
  roughness: 0.5,
},

materials.bin
all materials in gou format in contiguoius form as structs







compressed resources

material + binary: <material_name>.material <material_name>.material.bin
texture + source + binary: <image_name>.ext, <image_name>.texture, <image_name>.texture.bin


ALL credits for game are stored in credits/credits.json and this is what is loaded and presented in the game


The editor is a bunch of tools
so the actuall entire project manager / game editor (so i guess we just make the dockspace one of these) is one tool navigatable by tabs at the top of the application.
more tools include, the atlas generator where you can load textures and put them into bigger textures for memory help
the asset cooker
